basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Associate and Agromet Observer Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Woman

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Agrometeorology or Agronomy/Meteorology/Agriculture Physics, 10+2 Science or Diploma in Agriculture with computer knowledge
qualification.details: Research Associate (RA) under GKMS Scheme: Post-Graduation Degree (M.Sc.) in Agrometeorology from a recognized University/Institution. If candidates with Agrometeorology qualification are not available, then candidates with qualifications in Agronomy/Meteorology/Agriculture Physics may be considered. Candidate having knowledge/experience in meteorological data processing, interpretation with field data, agricultural knowledge with experience, remote sensing and crop simulation modelling will be preferred. Preference will be given to the candidates who are having experience in the field of Agrometeorology & knowledge of computer. One research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) NAAS rated (≥4). Agromet Observer: 10+2 from science stream /Diploma in Agriculture from recognized University/Institution along with the knowledge of computer operations. Candidates with experience in recording meteorological data, documentation, Agrometeorological data analysis and report writing are preferable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.61,000/- +HRA for M.Sc. (Ag.) holders (Consolidated) Rs.67,000/- +HRA for Ph.D. holders (Consolidated) for Research Associate; Rs.21,700/- + DA +HRA per month (As applicable) for Agromet Observer
salary_details.details: Research Associate (RA) under GKMS Scheme: Rs.61,000/- +HRA for M.Sc. (Ag.) holders (Consolidated) Rs.67,000/- +HRA for Ph.D. holders (Consolidated) Agromet Observer: Rs.21,700/- + DA +HRA per month (As applicable)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Associate and Agromet Observer posts at ANGRAU is scheduled for 19th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate position, candidates need a Post-Graduation Degree (M.Sc.) in Agrometeorology. Alternatively, qualifications in Agronomy, Meteorology, or Agriculture Physics may be considered if Agrometeorology graduates are unavailable. Experience in related fields is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Woman candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ANGRAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Agromet Observer post?
faq.answer: The Agromet Observer post offers a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,700/- per month, plus applicable Dearness Allowance (DA) and House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies. Recent passport-size photographs are also required.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Nandyal, Andhra Pradesh. The specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any preferences for candidates applying for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with experience in meteorological data processing, interpretation with field data, agricultural knowledge, remote sensing, crop simulation modelling, and those with experience in Agrometeorology and computer knowledge. A published research paper is also a preference.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ANGRAU?
faq.answer: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Research Associate and Agromet Observer.

faq.question: Q10. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time with all required documents.
